chase.TimeChase.time_recursion.code:
class TimeChase:
    def time_recursion(self, n, chase_strategy, cq_compilation):
        self.dl.push_scope()
        self.dl.walk(Eb_([
            Imp_(Q(x, z), T(x, y, w) & Q(w, z)),
            Imp_(Q(x, z), T(x, y, z)),
        ]))
        self.chase(self.dl).build_chase_solution()
        self.dl.push_scope()

    def setup(self, n, chase_strategy, cq_compilation):
        from numpy import random
    
        rstate = random.RandomState(0)
        t = rstate.randint(
            0, max(n // 100, 2), size=(3, n)
        )
    
        dl = Datalog()
        dl.add_extensional_predicate_from_tuples(
            T,
            (tuple(row) for row in t)
        )
    
        class Chase(chase_strategy, cq_compilation, ChaseGeneral):
            pass
    
        self.dl = dl
        self.chase = Chase
chase.TimeChase.time_recursion.name: chase.TimeChase.time_recursion

chase.TimeChase.time_selection.name: chase.TimeChase.time_selection

datalog_frontend.TimeRegionComparisons.t.name: datalog_frontend.TimeRegionComparisons.time_spatial_relation

ras_operations.TimeRASOperations.time_cr.code:
class TimeRASOperations:
    def time_cross_product(self, backend, n):
        ras = self.RAS
        sa = ras.RelationalAlgebraFrozenSet(self.tuples_a[: self.n_small])
        sb = ras.RelationalAlgebraFrozenSet(self.tuples_b[: self.n_small])
        sa.cross_product(sb)

    def setup(self, backend, n):
        config.set_query_backend(backend)
    
        import neurolang.utils.relational_algebra_set as ras_mod
        importlib.reload(ras_mod)
        self.RAS = ras_mod
    
        half = n // 2
        self.tuples_a = [(i, i * 2, f"a_{i % 100}") for i in range(n)]
        self.tuples_b = [
            (i, i * 3, f"b_{i % 100}") for i in range(half, n + half)
        ]
        self.tuples_c = [(i, i // 2, f"c_{i % 50}") for i in range(n)]
        self.n_small = max(1, min(500, n // 20))
        self.n = n
ras_operations.TimeRASOperations.time_cr.name: ras_operations.TimeRASOperations.time_cross_product

class TimeRASOperations:
    def time_difference(self, backend, n):
        ras = self.RAS
        sa = self._named_xy_label(ras, self.tuples_a)
        sb = self._named_xy_label(ras, self.tuples_b)
        _ = sa - sb

    def setup(self, backend, n):
        config.set_query_backend(backend)
    
        import neurolang.utils.relational_algebra_set as ras_mod

class TimeRASOperations:
    def time_extended_projection(self, backend, n):
        ras = self.RAS
        sa = self._named_xy_label(ras, self.tuples_a)
        sa.extended_projection({"x": "x", "double_x": "x * 2"})

    def setup(self, backend, n):
        config.set_query_backend(backend)
    
        import neurolang.utils.relational_algebra_set as ras_mod

ras_operations.TimeRASOperations.time_gr.code:
class TimeRASOperations:
    def time_groupby_agg(self, backend, n):
        ras = self.RAS
        sc = self._named_xy_label(ras, self.tuples_c)
        sc.aggregate(["label"], {"x": sum})

    def setup(self, backend, n):
        config.set_query_backend(backend)
    
        import neurolang.utils.relational_algebra_set as ras_mod
        importlib.reload(ras_mod)
        self.RAS = ras_mod
    
        half = n // 2
        self.tuples_a = [(i, i * 2, f"a_{i % 100}") for i in range(n)]

class TimeRASOperations:
    def time_naturaljoin(self, backend, n):
        ras = self.RAS
        sa = self._named_xy_label(ras, self.tuples_a)

ras_operations.TimeRASOperations.time_se.code:
class TimeRASOperations:
    def time_selection_callable(self, backend, n):
        ras = self.RAS
        s = ras.RelationalAlgebraFrozenSet(self.tuples_a)
        s.selection(lambda t: t[0] % 2 == 0)

    def setup(self, backend, n):
        config.set_query_backend(backend)
    
        import neurolang.utils.relational_algebra_set as ras_mod
